note: Golden cases for refactor-defect accumulation detectors (docs/REFACTOR_DEFECT_ACCUMULATION.md). Each case is an ordered sequence of complete source snapshots; `01-before`/`02-after` directory order is the revision order. Consumed by crates/deslop-cli/tests/refactor_risk.rs: expectations check `findings` unless `"summary": true`, which checks `summaries` (adoption-chain-incomplete must never appear in findings).

expectations.note: decision and public score both moved to the posterior
method renamed with all call sites updated; no ownership change
decision moved to posterior; public_score still reads the former owner
same migration as py-owner-moved-stale in Julia syntax
producer nests metric and adds seed; validator unchanged
deliberate adapter plus tested conversion invariant is counter-evidence that suppresses the finding
THRESHOLD_V2 replaced THRESHOLD reads while the retired key stays in the DEFAULTS acceptance surface
key removed from reads and literals alike; nothing stale remains
decision moved to posterior; public_score still reads the former owner
unchanged test still exercises the former owner representation
consumer and test-oracle stages share one owner migration; summarized once, never double-counted
producer moved from emit to emit_v2; verifier still calls emit
producer nests metric; verifier still requires it
two families share the build_manifest owner migration
migration at rev2; stale edge survives to rev3 while the owner is edited independently (exact persistence numbers are asserted in deslop-analyzer unit tests)
